message:
fix: update Cargo.lock, fix serde field name assertions, fix grep test param

Cargo.lock:
- asupersync dependency now resolves from crates.io registry instead of
  git rev pin (reflects upstream crate publication)
- sqlmodel-core bumped to 0.1.1

tests/e2e_tui.rs:
- Fix session content assertions to match actual serde camelCase output:
  tool_use -> toolCall (ContentBlock rename_all = "camelCase")
  tool_result -> toolResult (SessionMessage rename_all = "camelCase")

tests/tools_conformance.rs:
- Fix grep test: rename "include" param to "glob" to match GrepTool's
  actual input schema

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Sync issue tracking state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -306,7 +306,8 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
 version = "0.1.0"
-source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync?rev=393d13e134ba5908f03fde1e5cbc24e62de8f807#393d13e134ba5908f03fde1e5cbc24e62de8f807"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "45551c816d1bb377e94e2633e48e6ab3cedfba821fa1d0eee52f1f2164b17db8"
 dependencies = [
  "base64 0.22.1",
  "bincode",
@@ -5170,9 +5171,9 @@ checksum = "3b9b39299b249ad65f3b7e96443bad61c02ca5cd3589f46cb6d610a0fd6c0d6a"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "sqlmodel-core"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
- "asupersync 0.1.0 (git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync?rev=393d13e134ba5908f03fde1e5cbc24e62de8f807)",
+ "asupersync 0.1.0 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
  "regex",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
@@ -5181,9 +5182,9 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "sqlmodel-sqlite"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
- "asupersync 0.1.0 (git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/asupersync?rev=393d13e134ba5908f03fde1e5cbc24e62de8f807)",
+ "asupersync 0.1.0 (registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index)",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "sqlmodel-core",
